Awp0UnAlignDesignDesc: Remove the selected design from the part.
Awp0UnAlignPartDesc: Remove the selected part from the design.
Awp0SetPrimaryDesignDesc: Set the selection as the primary design representation of the part.
Awb0EntCBAAlignDesc: Align the selected part and design.
Awb0EntCBAUnAlignDesc: Remove the alignment between the selected part and design.
Awb0EntCBALaunchAlignTaskDesc: Open a structure to align its parts with designs.
AlignedIndiDesc: Indicates if the selected part or design is aligned.
AlignedIndiClickDesc: Click to view the aligned instances.
NotAlignedIndiDesc: The part or design is not aligned.
MissingPartIndiDesc: The part required for alignment is missing.
MissingDesignIndiDesc: The design required for alignment is missing.
Awb0EntCBAAlignmentCheckDesc: Refresh the alignment indicators to view the latest alignment status.
Awb0EntCBAAlignmentCheckSettingsDesc: Set the options to perform an alignment check.
Awb0EntCBAOpenGroupDesc: Open the selection in your browser.
Awb0EntCBAOpenObjectDesc: Open the selected object in the current window.
Awb0EntCBAOpenInNewWindowDesc: Open the selection in new browser window.
Awb0EntCBAOpenInNewTabDesc: Open the selection in new browser tab.
